channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SFL] Sheela Foam Ltd: Completion of Second Term for Independent Director Vijay Kumar Ahluwalia
item.description:
Sheela Foam Ltd has announced the completion of the second consecutive term of appointment for Mr. Vijay Kumar Ahluwalia as a Non-Executive Independent Director. His tenure concluded on March 04, 2026, and he ceased to be a Non-Executive Independent Director and a member of various committees from March 05, 2026. This change is due to the completion of his second term as an Independent Director.

  • Completion of the second consecutive term of appointment for Mr. Vijay Kumar Ahluwalia as a Non-Executive Independent Director.
  • Mr. Vijay Kumar Ahluwalia ceased to be a Non-Executive Independent Director and a member of various committees from March 05, 2026.
  • Change is a result of the completion of his second term as an Independent Director.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sheela Foam Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [BALKRISIND] Balkrishna Industries Sets Record Date for Commercial Paper Redemption on 12th March 2026
item.description:
Balkrishna Industries Limited has announced the record date for the redemption of its commercial paper. The record date is set for the 12th of March, 2026, for the commercial paper of Rs. 100 Crores issued by the company. The maturity date for this commercial paper is the 13th of March, 2026.

  • Balkrishna Industries Limited sets record date for commercial paper redemption.
  • The record date is on the 12th of March, 2026.
  • The commercial paper is worth Rs. 100 Crores.
  • The maturity date of the commercial paper is on the 13th of March, 2026.
  • The announcement is made for the shareholders and stakeholders to take necessary actions.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BALKRISHNA INDUSTRIES LTD.-$ | Category: Commercial Paper

item.title: [PGCRL] Pearl Green Clubs and Resorts Ltd to Review Director and Board Performance
item.description:
Pearl Green Clubs and Resorts Ltd has announced a meeting of the Board of Directors on 14/03/2026. The agenda includes reviewing the performance of Non-Independent Directors, the Board as a whole, and the Chairman of the Company. The meeting will also assess the quantity, quality, and timeliness of information flow. An additional meeting of the Independent Directors will be held to transact the aforementioned business.

  • Pearl Green Clubs and Resorts Ltd has scheduled a Board Meeting on 14/03/2026
  • The performance of Non-Independent Directors, the Board as a whole, and the Chairman will be reviewed
  • The meeting will assess the quantity, quality, and timeliness of information flow
  • A separate meeting of Independent Directors will be held to transact the business
  • The announcement has been made to BSE

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Pearl Green Clubs and Resorts Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [FORCEMOT] Force Motors Ltd. Receives Communication from SEBI Regarding Unaudited Financial Results
item.description:
Force Motors Ltd. has received an email from the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) regarding the announcement of its unaudited financial results for the quarter and half year ended on 30th September, 2024. SEBI sought information related to the aforesaid announcement, including the chronology of events, details of insiders, MIS, details of Designated Persons, and extract of Structured Digital Database from the commencement of the event till the information was published or became public. The company will file a suitable reply to SEBI within the permissible timeline.

  • Force Motors Ltd. received communication from SEBI regarding its unaudited financial results for the quarter and half year ended on 30th September, 2024.
  • SEBI sought information related to the announcement including chronology of events, details of insiders, MIS, details of Designated Persons, and extract of Structured Digital Database.
  • The communication from SEBI is in relation to the announcement made by the company on 29th October, 2024.
  • Force Motors Ltd. will file a suitable reply to SEBI within the permissible timeline.
  • There is no material impact on the financial operations of the company at this stage.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FORCE MOTORS LTD.-$ | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [DEEDEV] Dee Development Engineers Ltd Subsidiary Receives Order Worth INR 20 Crores from International Customer
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Dee Development Engineers Ltd announced that its material subsidiary, M/s DEE Piping Systems (Thailand) Co. Ltd., has received an order amounting to Euro 1.9 million (INR 20 Crores) from an International customer for the supply of HRSG piping for a Taiwan project. The order is for the supply and fabrication of piping materials, and it is expected to be executed by May 2027.

  • Dee Development Engineers Ltd subsidiary received an order worth INR 20 Crores from an International customer.
  • The order is for the supply and fabrication of piping materials for a Taiwan project.
  • The order is expected to be executed by May 2027.
  • The customer is an International entity.
  • The order amount is Euro 1.9 million.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dee Development Engineers Ltd | Category: Deals

item.title: [NAHARCAP] Nahar Capital and Financial Services Ltd Reports 401 Shares Dematerialized in February 2026
item.description:
Nahar Capital and Financial Services Ltd, a Non-Banking Financial Company, has released the Demat Report for February 2026. The report indicates that 401 Equity Shares have been dematerialized during the month. After dematerialization, the Share Certificates have been cancelled and replaced with the name of the Depository as the Registered Owner in the company's records. As of the date, the total holding of National Securities Depository Ltd. (NSDL) and Central Depository Services (India) Ltd. (CDSL) stands at 16638836 Equity Shares.

  • 401 Equity Shares dematerialized in February 2026
  • Share Certificates cancelled and replaced with Depository as Registered Owner
  • Total holding of NSDL and CDSL stands at 16638836 Equity Shares

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NAHAR CAPITAL & FINANCIAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [FORCEMOT] Force Motors Ltd. Receives Clarification Request from SEBI on Q3 FY2023 Results
item.description:
Force Motors Ltd. has received an email from the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) seeking clarifications and details regarding the announcement of its unaudited financial results for the quarter and nine months ended on 31 December 2023. The communication also seeks details on significant price movement from 15 February 2024 to 20 February 2024. The company will file a suitable reply to SEBI within the permissible timeline. There is no material impact on the financial operations of the company at this stage.

  • Force Motors Ltd. receives communication from SEBI regarding Q3 FY2023 results
  • SEBI seeks clarifications and details on price movement
  • Company to file a reply to SEBI within the permissible timeline
  • No material impact on the company's financial operations at this stage

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FORCE MOTORS LTD.-$ | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [PNB] Punjab National Bank Announces Changes in Senior Management
item.description:
Punjab National Bank has announced changes in its senior management with effect from 5th March 2026. The changes include the appointment of a new Chairman and Chief General Manager for the Haryana and Rohtak Division, Gramin Bank. The new Chairman is a Master of Arts and Manager - Agriculture & Priority Sector and Financial Inclusion with over 32 years of experience in the bank. The bank has requested for the above changes to be taken on record.

  • Punjab National Bank announces new Chairman and Chief General Manager
  • The new Chairman is a Master of Arts and Manager - Agriculture & Priority Sector and Financial Inclusion
  • The new appointee has over 32 years of experience in the bank
  • The changes are effective from 5th March 2026
  • The bank has requested for the changes to be taken on record

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PUNJAB NATIONAL BANK | Category: New Launch

item.title: [FORCEMOT] Force Motors Ltd. Discloses SEBI Communication on Unaudited Financial Results for Q2 & HY 2024-25
item.description:
Force Motors Ltd. has disclosed information pursuant to Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The company received a communication from the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) on 4th February, 2026, requesting information related to the announcement of unaudited financial results for the quarter and half-year ended on 30th September, 2024. SEBI sought details such as the chronology of events, insiders, MIS, Designated Persons, and extract of Structured Digital Database from the commencement of the event till the information was published or became public. The company is expected to file a suitable reply within the permissible timeline and there is no material impact on the financial operations of the company at this stage.

  • Force Motors Ltd. received a communication from SEBI regarding the announcement of unaudited financial results for Q2 & HY 2024-25.
  • SEBI requested information including chronology of events, insiders, MIS, Designated Persons, and extract of Structured Digital Database.
  • The company is required to file a suitable reply to SEBI within the permissible timeline.
  • There is no material impact on the financial operations of the company at this stage.
  • The communication from SEBI was received on 4th February, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FORCE MOTORS LTD.-$ | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [CGCL] Capri Global Capital Ltd to Issue Non-Convertible Debentures Worth Rs. 2,000 Crores
item.description:
Capri Global Capital Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on March 10, 2026, to consider and approve the issuance of Non-Convertible Debentures aggregating up to Rs. 2,000 crores through a public issue. The issuance will be in accordance with the provisions of the Companies Act, 2013, and SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. The meeting's agenda also includes other matters as per the regulations.

  • Capri Global Capital Ltd to issue Non-Convertible Debentures worth Rs. 2,000 crores
  • The issuance will be through a public issue in one or more tranches
  • The decision will be made in the Board of Directors meeting scheduled on March 10, 2026
  • The issuance is in accordance with the Companies Act, 2013, and SEBI regulations
  • The announcement also includes other matters as per the regulations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Capri Global Capital Limited | Category: Investment
